queue.title: Backup substitution rate dashboard in A audit
queue.description: Add substitution frequency tracking to audit-stats.mjs. Read backup_substitutions from engagement-trace.json across recent E sessions. Report 'N substitutions in last 10 E sessions, top replaced: X'. Surface chronically unreachable platforms that should be circuit-broken rather than substituted.

queue.title: TODO scan: tighten exclusions based on FP rate data
queue.description: The todo_false_positive_rate metric shows 51% combined FP rate (elevated). Queue-level FP rate is 78% (18/23 todo-scan items retired). Use per-item text from todo-tracker.json to identify new exclusion patterns or widen existing ones in todo-false-positives.json. Alternatively raise ingest threshold in queue-pipeline.mjs to require more specific TODO comments.

queue.title: Auto-escalation for E/R cost trends in audit-checks
queue.description: audit-stats.mjs now computes e_cost_trend and r_cost_trend (wq-875), but audit-checks has no escalation logic consuming them. Add e_session_cost and r_session_cost to escalation_tracker — same pattern as existing b_session_cost escalation. When threshold_crossed is true ($1.50 for E, $2.00 for R), auto-create wq items. Currently the data is produced but not acted on.

queue.title: Add tw_run_fn helper to timeout-wrapper.sh
queue.description: Currently tw_run requires 'bash -c ...' for multi-line check logic. Adding a tw_run_fn helper that wraps function dispatch (declare -f + call) would simplify future hook migrations to timeout-wrapper.sh. Small utility addition, clear scope.

queue.title: A session human-review schema validation before wq creation
queue.description: A#203 created wq-879 for a false-positive schema issue (hr-a173-1 already had correct status field). The A session should run validate-human-review.mjs (or check required fields) before creating data-hygiene wq items. Prevents false-positive queue items that waste B session time on investigation.

queue.title: Prioritize wq-880 timeout-wrapper migration for 02-periodic-checks.sh
queue.description: 02-periodic-checks.sh timing regression recurred — p95 jumped to 10486ms (was fixed to ~3000ms by wq-874 in s1807). The same pattern repeats: platform-health check timing out. wq-880 (timeout-wrapper migration) is the structural fix. Prioritize in next B session.
